'''âk-s-d-v''' ('''kakasdevoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:venge|venge]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-s-d-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:venge|venge]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âk-s-d-v
|-
! Lemma
| kakasdevoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thikasdevoko|thikasdevoko]] || [[word:jikasdevoko|jikasdevoko]] || [[word:shikasdevoko|shikasdevoko]] || [[word:kikasdevoko|kikasdevoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthukasdevoko|thuthukasdevoko]] || [[word:jujukasdevoko|jujukasdevoko]] || [[word:shushukasdevoko|shushukasdevoko]] || [[word:kukukasdevoko|kukukasdevoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thukasdevoko|thukasdevoko]] || [[word:jukasdevoko|jukasdevoko]] || [[word:shukasdevoko|shukasdevoko]] || [[word:kukasdevoko|kukasdevoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thokasdevoko|thokasdevoko]] || [[word:jokasdevoko|jokasdevoko]] || [[word:shokasdevoko|shokasdevoko]] || [[word:kokasdevoko|kokasdevoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠkasdevoko|thĂŠkasdevoko]] || [[word:jĂŠkasdevoko|jĂŠkasdevoko]] || [[word:shĂŠkasdevoko|shĂŠkasdevoko]] || [[word:kĂŠkasdevoko|kĂŠkasdevoko]]
|-

|-

|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thakasdevoko|thakasdevoko]] || [[word:jakasdevoko|jakasdevoko]] || [[word:shakasdevoko|shakasdevoko]] || [[word:kakasdevoko|kakasdevoko]]
|}
